description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design and a solid black finish. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and a continuous, straight backrest that extends the full width of the piece. Both armrests are present, rounded, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at the corners, providing sturdy support while remaining visually unobtrusive. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving the sofa a contemporary and understated appearance. This type of sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A sleek, black three-seater sofa with rounded armrests, smooth upholstery, and block-style legs. Its minimalist design and uniform cushions give it a modern, understated look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded armrest and the full depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both armrests, two large seat cushions, and the continuous backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the armrest and sofa depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the straight, continuous backrest and the block-style legs at the corners.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and a continuous, attached back cushion spanning the full width.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, rounded and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest with a smooth, cylindrical profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or metal, with a solid and unobtrusive appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, attached and unsegmented, with a smooth surface and no visible tufting or detailing.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative details.
